home.slogan: Project Collaboration Services for Port Groups
home.description: For coastal port groups such as Jiangsu Yancheng Port Holding Group, Shanghai Yanghuiyang provides technical consulting, on-site survey, system implementation, and risk judgement support around green smart port operations, vessel operation assurance, maritime asset management, and project delivery.
home.businessIntro: We turn port-site operations, vessel services, green energy, safety management, and maritime asset transactions into project modules that can be investigated, piloted, implemented, and accepted.
home.shipOperationsDesc: Covering ship repair, technical management, and spare parts supply, providing you with one-stop, high-standard ship operation support.
home.portTechnologyDesc: Focusing on port network security, intelligent monitoring software development, and ship-shore data integration to enhance operational efficiency.
home.secondhandTradingDesc: Providing dedicated technical survey and assessment, full-cycle transaction advisory, and maritime asset risk judgement for vessel acquisition, disposal, renewal, and financing decisions.

cooperation.title: Cooperation Directions for Yancheng Port Scenarios
cooperation.desc: For coastal port areas, inland port nodes, sea-river intermodal logistics, and green smart port construction, we recommend low-risk, verifiable pilot projects with demonstration value.

items.title: Green Port & Shore Power O&M
items.desc: Inspection, energy records, issue closure, and ship-shore coordination for sustainable shore power operations.

items.title: Port Safety & Dispatch Informatization
items.desc: Lightweight pilots connecting video, equipment, operation plans, and ship-shore information before expanding to integrated dashboards.

items.title: Ship Repair & Spares Support
items.desc: Maintenance planning, spare parts supply, certificate alerts, and technical management for port craft and partner fleets.

items.title: Maritime Asset Survey & Risk
items.desc: Condition survey, repair budget, and transaction risk opinion for vessel acquisition, disposal, leasing, and cooperative operations.

home.advantagesIntro: We connect marine engineering, port informatization, compliance management, and transaction judgement in one operating view, reducing information gaps and improving decision quality.
home.adv1Desc: Long-term experience across shipowners, ports, and vessel management scenarios, with practical understanding of field operations, survey requirements, procurement chains, and delivery risk.
home.adv2Desc: Capabilities in software customization, intelligent monitoring, cybersecurity, and data integration turn operational workflows into traceable and alert-driven systems.
home.adv3Desc: A collaborative response model around major domestic and international ports supports repair, supply, inspection, and transaction coordination.
home.adv4Desc: A multidisciplinary team of marine technical experts, shipping specialists, software engineers, and risk advisors balances technical depth with commercial judgement.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Digital Transformation?
cta.desc: Contact our expert team to get a tailored solution for your business.

aboutSummary.title: Starting from Field Problems, Ending with Delivery
aboutSummary.desc: We aim to become an external collaboration team for port groups on specialized projects. By combining marine engineering experience, port IT capability, on-site survey methods, and asset risk assessment, we help turn complex needs into clear research, pilot, implementation, and acceptance paths.

footer.address: Room JT4106, 3F, Building 2, No. 501 Pan'an Road, Jiading District, Shanghai
footer.copyright: © 2026 Shanghai Yanghuiyang Technology Co., Ltd. All Rights Reserved.

about.title: About Us
about.profileText: Shanghai Yanghuiyang Technology Co., Ltd. is an innovative enterprise focusing on ship operation services and port informatization. Relying on the location advantage of Shanghai International Shipping Center, we have gathered a group of compound talents with rich navigation experience and cutting-edge software development capabilities.

historyItems.event: Officially registered in Jiading District, Shanghai, establishing the development direction of 'Technology Empowering Port & Shipping'.
Successfully developed the first set of intelligent monitoring management software compliant with CCS regulations.
Business territory further expanded, with spare parts supply network covering major domestic ports.
Awarded multiple industry qualifications and established strategic partnerships with well-known port groups.

ship.title: Ship Operations
ship.repairDesc: Providing professional voyage repair and dry-docking cooperation services to ensure vessels return to optimal sailing condition in the shortest time.
ship.managementDesc: Providing comprehensive technical management consulting and outsourcing services for shipowners, reducing operating costs.
ship.supplyDesc: Strictly following ISSA/IMPA standards, establishing an efficient global procurement network. Providing OEM and high-quality alternative spare parts.
ship.pmsDesc: Relying on professional management software to provide PMS and CMS planning and implementation, achieving intelligent early warning for certificate expiration.

port.title: Port & IT
port.securityDesc: Providing comprehensive risk assessment and protection solutions against cybersecurity threats faced by ports and ships.
port.ccsDesc: Self-developed intelligent monitoring management software fully compliant with CCS requirements.
port.integrationDesc: Breaking information silos, establishing an efficient and stable ship-shore data communication mechanism.
port.customizationDesc: Providing customized software development services covering port operations, ship management, and logistics tracking according to specific needs.

secondhand.title: Used Vessel Transaction Services
secondhand.overview: Used vessel transactions often involve vessel condition authenticity, remaining service life, repair investment, certificate compliance, delivery arrangements, market pricing, and legal-commercial risks. Yanghuiyang starts from technical survey and extends into transaction advisory and risk judgement, providing buyers, sellers, investors, and management companies with professional evidence for negotiation, pricing, and delivery decisions.
secondhand.surveyDesc: Specialized inspection covering hull structure, machinery and electrical systems, deck equipment, certificate status, maintenance records, dry-docking history, and defect lists, producing condition assessment, repair budget advice, and transaction attention points.
secondhand.consultingDesc: Support across pre-transaction due diligence, target screening, price negotiation, survey arrangements, spare parts and repair planning, and delivery milestone coordination to improve execution certainty.
secondhand.riskDesc: Multi-dimensional risk review based on vessel age and type, operating area, compliance certificates, market cycle, residual value, potential repair liabilities, and delivery conditions, supporting investment, disposal, and financing decisions.
deliverables: Delivery execution advice and milestone checklist

seo.title: Shanghai Yanghuiyang Technology - Port Group Project Collaboration & Maritime Asset Services
seo.description: Shanghai Yanghuiyang Technology provides green smart port operations support, port safety and dispatch informatization, ship repair and spare parts services, used vessel technical survey, and maritime asset transaction risk judgement for port groups and maritime enterprises.
